glosses.es: profesora del curso; instructora del curso
glosses.it: docente del corso; istruttrice del corso
glosses.zh-Hans: 女讲师; 女课程负责人
glosses.yue: 女導師; 課程女負責人
glosses.pt: professora do curso; instrutora do curso
glosses.vi: giảng viên khóa học; người hướng dẫn khóa học
glosses.ro: profesoară de curs; instructoare de curs
glosses.ja: 講座の講師; コースの担当講師

sentences.target: Die Kursleiterin erklärt die Aufgabe langsam.

translations.de: Die Kursleiterin erklärt die Aufgabe langsam.
translations.en: The course instructor explains the task slowly.
translations.es: La profesora explica el ejercicio despacio.
translations.pt: A instrutora explica o exercício devagar.
translations.vi: Cô giáo giải thích bài tập chậm rãi.
translations.nl: De docente legt de oefening langzaam uit.
translations.hu: A tanárnő lassan magyarázza a feladatot.
translations.hi: शिक्षिका अभ्यास को धीरे-धीरे समझाती है।
translations.el: Η εκπαιδεύτρια εξηγεί την άσκηση αργά.
translations.ja: 講師は課題をゆっくり説明します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; introduces the subject noun phrase.
Common noun; feminine; singular; nominative; subject of the sentence.
Main verb; present tense; 3rd person singular; transitive, taking a direct object.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; marks the direct object.
Common noun; feminine; singular; accusative; direct object of 'erklärt'.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb, indicating the way the explaining is done.

sentences.target: Ich frage die Kursleiterin nach dem Termin.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈkʊʁslaɪ̯təʁɪn naːx deːm tɛʁˈmiːn/

translations.de: Ich frage die Kursleiterin nach dem Termin.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈkʊʁslaɪ̯təʁɪn naːx deːm tɛʁˈmiːn/
translations.en: I ask the course instructor about the date.
translations.es: Le pregunto a la profesora por la fecha.
translations.fr: Je demande la date à la formatrice.
translations.yue: 我問導師個日期係幾時。
translations.ru: Я спрашиваю у преподавательницы о дате.
translations.pt: Eu pergunto à instrutora sobre a data.
translations.he: אני שואל את המדריכה על התאריך.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi cô giáo về ngày hẹn.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de docente naar de datum.
translations.hi: मैं शिक्षिका से तारीख के बारे में पूछता हूँ।
translations.el: Ρωτάω την εκπαιδεύτρια για την ημερομηνία.
translations.id: Saya bertanya kepada instruktur tentang tanggal.
translations.ja: 私は講師に日程について尋ねます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative; subject.
Main verb; present tense; 1st person singular; governs an accusative object and a prepositional object with 'nach'.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; marks the person being asked (direct object).
Common noun; feminine; singular; accusative; direct object of 'frage' (the person asked).
Preposition governing dative; introduces a prepositional object indicating the topic of the question.
Definite article; masculine dative singular; accompanies 'Termin' as object of 'nach'.
Common noun; masculine; singular; dative; object of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Unsere Kursleiterin bringt heute Kuchen mit.

translations.de: Unsere Kursleiterin bringt heute Kuchen mit.
translations.en: Our course instructor is bringing cake today.
translations.fr: Notre formatrice apporte du gâteau aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La nostra istruttrice porta una torta oggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的老师今天带了蛋糕来。
translations.yue: 我哋嘅導師今日帶咗蛋糕嚟。
translations.pt: Nossa instrutora vai trazer bolo hoje.
translations.vi: Cô giáo của chúng tôi hôm nay mang bánh đến.
translations.nl: Onze docente neemt vandaag taart mee.
translations.hu: A mi tanárnőnk ma tortát hoz.
translations.hi: हमारी शिक्षिका आज केक ला रही है।
translations.pl: Nasza prowadząca kurs dziś przynosi ciasto.
translations.el: Η εκπαιδεύτριά μας σήμερα φέρνει κέικ.
translations.nb: Kurslederen vår tar med kake i dag.
translations.id: Instruktur kami hari ini membawa kue.
translations.sv: Vår kursledare tar med tårta i dag.
translations.da: Vores kursusleder tager kage med i dag.
translations.ja: 私たちの講師は今日ケーキを持ってきます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with a feminine nominative singular noun; modifies 'Kursleiterin'.
Common noun; feminine; singular; nominative; subject.
Main verb; present tense; 3rd person singular; part of the separable verb 'mitbringen'.
Temporal adverb; indicates time of the action.
Common noun; masculine; singular; accusative; direct object (thing being brought).
Separable verb particle; completes the meaning of 'bringt' to form 'mitbringen' (“bring along”).

sentences.target: Alle hören der Kursleiterin aufmerksam zu.

translations.de: Alle hören der Kursleiterin aufmerksam zu.
translations.en: Everyone listens attentively to the course instructor.
translations.es: Todos escuchan con atención a la profesora.
translations.fr: Tout le monde écoute la formatrice attentivement.
translations.zh-Hans: 大家都专心听老师说话。
translations.pt: Todos ouvem a instrutora com atenção.
translations.vi: Mọi người chăm chú lắng nghe cô giáo.
translations.nl: Iedereen luistert aandachtig naar de docente.
translations.hi: सब लोग शिक्षिका की बात ध्यान से सुनते हैं।
translations.el: Όλοι ακούν με προσοχή την εκπαιδεύτρια.
translations.id: Semua orang mendengarkan instruktur dengan saksama.
translations.ja: みんなは講師の話を熱心に聞きます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite pronoun; plural; nominative; subject (refers to all people present).
Main verb; present tense; 3rd person plural; part of the separable verb 'zuhören' (to listen to).
Definite article; feminine dative singular; introduces the recipient/target NP required by 'zuhören'.
Common noun; feminine; singular; dative; prepositional/indirect object with 'zuhören' (the person being listened to).
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb, indicating the way of listening.
Separable verb particle; completes the meaning of 'hören' to form 'zuhören' (“listen to”).

Ich frage die Kursleiterin nach dem Termin.

Alle hören der Kursleiterin aufmerksam zu.

es: La profesora explica el ejercicio despacio.
Le pregunto a la profesora por la fecha.
Todos escuchan con atención a la profesora.
fr: Je demande la date à la formatrice.
Notre formatrice apporte du gâteau aujourd'hui.
Tout le monde écoute la formatrice attentivement.

Ik vraag de docente naar de datum.
Onze docente neemt vandaag taart mee.
Iedereen luistert aandachtig naar de docente.
hu: A tanárnő lassan magyarázza a feladatot.
A mi tanárnőnk ma tortát hoz.
hi: शिक्षिका अभ्यास को धीरे-धीरे समझाती है।
मैं शिक्षिका से तारीख के बारे में पूछता हूँ।
हमारी शिक्षिका आज केक ला रही है।
सब लोग शिक्षिका की बात ध्यान से सुनते हैं।
pl: Nasza prowadząca kurs dziś przynosi ciasto.
